reason_codes.ok: Runtime handoff and scheduler evidence completed without rollback conditions.
reason_codes.handoff_mapping_mismatch: PlanningOps handoff packet could not be mapped cleanly into monday runtime input.
reason_codes.scheduler_no_dequeue: Scheduler completed without dequeuing any runtime card.
reason_codes.duplicates_detected: Scheduler idempotency prevented duplicate dequeue for at least one card.
reason_codes.blocked_dependencies: Scheduler observed unresolved dependency edges but still produced valid evidence.
